subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Khalil
subcodes.first_line: The Sovereign of the Divine Realm and King of Life Who dieth not  hath so established and ornamented the Kingdom of Majesty and Beauty  and the Spiritual Realm of Might
subcodes.first_line_orig: ملکوت جلال و جمال و جبروت عظمت و اجلال سلطان لاهوت و ملیک حی لایموت را
